description_long: This is a compact, double-edged dagger with a symmetrical, spear-point blade finished in matte black. The blade features two elongated cutouts and a striking white tribal-style engraving near the base, adding a decorative touch. The handle is cylindrical, ribbed for grip, and ends in a rounded pommel, likely made of a durable synthetic or metal material. A small, flared guard separates the blade from the handle, providing some hand protection. The overall design is modern and tactical, with a focus on both aesthetics and functionality. The dagger's size and construction suggest it is intended for close-quarters use or as a utility tool.
description: A black, double-edged dagger with a tribal engraving on the blade and a ribbed, cylindrical handle ending in a rounded pommel. The design is modern, compact, and visually striking.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the blade, tribal engraving, cutouts, and ribbed handle with rounded pommel.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the narrow blade profile and the circular pommel at the end of the handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the blade and handle details, with the tribal engraving visible on the blade.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view showing the thinness of the blade and the rounded end of the handle.
attribute_handle_design: cylindrical, ribbed, black, rounded pommel, likely synthetic or metal
